name: deckit
description: An image-first deck workflow for turning text, PDF, or URL source material into deck briefs, storyboards, image-generation prompts, and generated slide images through the official $imagegen skill. PPTX is only an optional container for generated slide images, never a native production route.

interface.shortDescription: Turn source material into image-first slide prompts and generated slide images.
interface.longDescription: Deckit coordinates an image-first deck production workflow: ingest text / PDF / URL, shape the argument, plan slide storyboards, write image-generation prompts, invoke the official $imagegen skill to produce full-slide images, and run a rule-based review before delivery. Ambiguous requests such as "make a PPT" or "制作 PPT" are handled as image-first slide generation. Deckit does not create editable native PowerPoint decks; a .pptx, if needed, is only a non-editable container for generated full-slide images.
defaultPrompt: Turn this transcript into an image-first deck storyboard.
Create slide prompts and generate images from this outline.
Ingest this PDF (or URL) and start a deck.
Make a PPT as image-first slides with generated full-slide images.
